reference: Hello. I recently started taking Loestrin twenty-four back in May. I had sexual intercourse with my boyfriend for the first time at the end of June. I have not missed a period and have also had considerable breakthrough bleeding. I took three pregnancy tests and all were negative. Can I still be pregnant?
text: Hello. I recently started taking Loestrin 24 back in May. I had sexual intercourse with my boyfriend for the first time at the end of June. I have not missed a period and have also had considerable breakthrough bleeding. I took three pregnancy tests and all were negative. Can I still be pregnant?
